recommendations.title: Breakout
recommendations.overview: A bush pilot is hired for $50,000 to go to Mexico to free an innocent prisoner.

recommendations.title: Will Penny
recommendations.overview: Will Penny, an aging cowpoke, takes a job on a ranch which requires him to ride the line of the property looking for trespassers or, worse, squatters. He finds that his cabin in the high mountains has been appropriated by a woman whose guide to Orego

recommendations.title: 100 Rifles
recommendations.overview: When half-breed Indian Yaqui Joe robs an Arizona bank, he is pursued by dogged lawman Lyedecker. Fleeing to Mexico, Joe is imprisoned by General Verdugo, who is waging a war against the Yaqui Indians. When Lyedecker attempts to intervene, he is throw

recommendations.title: Dances with Wolves
recommendations.overview: Wounded Civil War soldier John Dunbar tries to commit suicide—and becomes a hero instead. As a reward, he's assigned to his dream post, a remote junction on the Western frontier, and soon makes unlikely friends with the local Sioux tribe.

recommendations.title: Bad Day at Black Rock
recommendations.overview: One-armed war veteran John J. Macreedy steps off a train at the sleepy little town of Black Rock.  Once there, he begins to unravel a web of lies, secrecy, and murder.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.

recommendations.title: Ravenous
recommendations.overview: After arriving at his new, remote Army outpost, Capt. John Boyd and his regiment aid a wounded frontiersman who recounts a horrifying tale of a wagon train murdered by its supposed guide – a vicious U.S. Army colonel gone rogue. Fearing the worst, th

recommendations.title: Unbreakable
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man makes an extraordinary discovery when a train accident leaves his fellow passengers dead — and him unscathed. The answer to this mystery could lie with the mysterious Elijah Price, a man who suffers from a disease that renders his bon

recommendations.title: Hombre
recommendations.overview: John Russell, disdained by his "respectable" fellow stagecoach passengers because he was raised by Indians, becomes their only hope for survival when they are set upon by outlaws.

recommendations.title: Spirit Untamed
recommendations.overview: Lucky Prescott's life is changed forever when she moves from her home in the city to a small frontier town and befriends a wild mustang named Spirit.
